entities.name: LANDRACE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of traditional crop varieties with unique local agroecological and societal functions and genetic resources)

entities.name: EX SITU CONSERVATION
entities.description: The conservation of biological diversity outside their natural habitats, often in genebanks)

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The purposeful manipulation of plant species to create desired genotypes and phenotypes)

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant origin of actual or potential value for breeding)

entities.name: GENEBANK COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Facilities that store and maintain genetic resources for long-term conservation)

entities.name: POTENTIAL DISTRIBUTIONS
entities.description: Modeling of the geographic and ecological areas where landrace groups are likely to be found)

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC AND ECOLOGICAL COVERAGE METRICS
entities.description: Metrics used as a proxy for genetic diversity to analyze the representation of landraces in genebanks)

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species or group)
